segments.text: The king shall have joy in Your strength, O Lord;
And in Your salvation how greatly shall he rejoice!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have given him his heart's desire, And have not withheld the request of his lips.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You meet him with the blessings of goodness; You set a crown of pure gold upon his head.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and You gave it to him— Length of days forever and ever.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: His glory is great in Your salvation;
Honor and majesty You have placed upon him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You have made him most blessed forever; You have made him exceedingly glad with Your presence.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the king trusts in the Lord,
And through the mercy of the Most High he shall not be moved.
Your hand will find all Your enemies; Your right hand will find those who hate You.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall make them as a fiery oven in the time of Your anger; The Lord shall swallow them up in His wrath, And the fire shall devour them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Their offspring You shall destroy from the earth, And their descendants from among the sons of men.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For they intended evil against You;
They devised a plot which they are not able to perform.
Therefore You will make them turn their back; You will make ready Your arrows on Your string toward their faces.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Be exalted, O Lord, in Your own strength!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: We will sing and praise Your power.
segments.speaker: David
